topic: My passport photo has been visibly aging while I have not
title: My Passport Photo Has Been Aging While I Have Not | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My passport photo has been aging for three years. I have not.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open passport book on a wooden kitchen counter, the photograph page visible with the face slightly weathered, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Renewed it in twenty nineteen. Ten year passport. Standard photo.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a passport book held in a hand, the cover navy blue with gold lettering, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep it in the kitchen drawer. Travel twice a year.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a kitchen drawer pulled open with a passport book lying among receipts and pens, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled it out for a trip last March. The face in it looked tired.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a passport photograph showing a tired looking face with slight under eye darkening, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a smartphone screen showing a recent selfie alongside the passport photo for comparison, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The passport photo had crow's feet. I do not have crow's feet yet.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of the passport photograph zoomed in showing fine crow's feet visible around the eyes in the photo, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled the photographer's original file print.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a photographer's original print, a backup copy of the same image, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: His print is unchanged. My passport book photo has aged six years.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two photographs side by side, one an unchanged original print, one an aged passport book photograph, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last month the photo had new gray hair. I dyed mine that day.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the passport photograph showing gray streaks now visible in the hair, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The photo now has gray hair. Same shade as mine. Same pattern. Updated.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of the same passport photograph with gray hair in the same pattern as a recent selfie alongside it, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am thirty four. The photo looks fifty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a passport book held open on a table, the photograph face appearing far older than expected, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The expiration date is twenty twenty nine. The photo will outlive me.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a passport expiration date stamp showing twenty twenty nine, the photograph face heavily aged, vertical 9:16 framing
